sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking the red dot
# Compare previous_frame to current_frame
prev_seg = previous_frame.segmentation['nodes']
curr_seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

# Find the node that changed - the red dot at row 34, col 10
# In previous frame, node 17 was the red dot at (34, 10)
print("=== Checking yellow bar region for changes ===")
prev_ascii = previous_frame.ascii.split('\n')
curr_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

for i in range(33, 36):
    prev_line = prev_ascii[i][7:13]
    curr_line = curr_ascii[i][7:13]
    if prev_line != curr_line:
        print(f"Row {i}: BEFORE={prev_line}  AFTER={curr_line}  CHANGED!")
    else:
        print(f"Row {i}: {curr_line}")

# Also check if the red dot color changed
print()
for n in curr_seg:
    if n['pixels'] == 1 and n['color'] == 'r':
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"Red pixel node {n['id']}: boundary={b}, color={n['color']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
